prompt: Create a premium Nike-level sports campaign portrait of a young male teenage athlete with deep brown skin, standing front-facing with arms crossed and a calm confident slight smile, looking directly into the camera. He wears an FC Barcelona home football jersey in dark navy and burgundy vertical panels, with a gold Nike swoosh on the viewer-left chest, the FC Barcelona crest on the viewer-right chest, a gold Spotify sponsor logo centered, and a white LaLiga sleeve patch with red logo on the viewer-left sleeve. Use a dramatic black studio background with three visible copies of the same athlete: one sharp main portrait in the foreground on the left-center, plus exactly two blurred motion-echo duplicates behind him to the right, each semi-transparent and horizontally smeared as if captured with long exposure. Lighting should be cinematic sports advertising style: strong cyan-blue rim light from the left edge, warm orange-gold rim light from the right, glossy highlights on skin and jersey fabric, high contrast, shallow depth of field, realistic skin texture, crisp facial details on the main subject only. Composition is vertical 4:5, waist-up crop, subject occupying most of the frame, black negative space around the head and duplicates, no extra props, no crowd, no stadium, no added text beyond the authentic-looking jersey logos. Overall mood: elite football transfer reveal, dynamic speed, confidence, luxury athletic brand campaign. Customize the jersey team if desired as FC Barcelona and the campaign mood as confident elite footballer with motion echoes.
promptEn: Create a premium Nike-level sports campaign portrait of a young male teenage athlete with deep brown skin, standing front-facing with arms crossed and a calm confident slight smile, looking directly into the camera. He wears an FC Barcelona home football jersey in dark navy and burgundy vertical panels, with a gold Nike swoosh on the viewer-left chest, the FC Barcelona crest on the viewer-right chest, a gold Spotify sponsor logo centered, and a white LaLiga sleeve patch with red logo on the viewer-left sleeve. Use a dramatic black studio background with three visible copies of the same athlete: one sharp main portrait in the foreground on the left-center, plus exactly two blurred motion-echo duplicates behind him to the right, each semi-transparent and horizontally smeared as if captured with long exposure. Lighting should be cinematic sports advertising style: strong cyan-blue rim light from the left edge, warm orange-gold rim light from the right, glossy highlights on skin and jersey fabric, high contrast, shallow depth of field, realistic skin texture, crisp facial details on the main subject only. Composition is vertical 4:5, waist-up crop, subject occupying most of the frame, black negative space around the head and duplicates, no extra props, no crowd, no stadium, no added text beyond the authentic-looking jersey logos. Overall mood: elite football transfer reveal, dynamic speed, confidence, luxury athletic brand campaign. Customize the jersey team if desired as FC Barcelona and the campaign mood as confident elite footballer with motion echoes.
promptZh: 创作一张耐克级别的高级体育广告肖像，主角是一位年轻的 男性青少年运动员，拥有 深棕色皮肤，正面站立，双臂交叉，面带冷静自信的微笑，直视镜头。他身穿 FC Barcelona 主场足球球衣，采用深海军蓝和酒红色垂直条纹设计，左胸处有金色 Nike 勾形标志，右胸处有 FC Barcelona 队徽，胸前居中有金色 Spotify 赞助商标志，左袖上有白色 LaLiga 袖标及红色 Logo。背景为戏剧性的黑色影棚背景，画面中可见该运动员的三个影像：左中位置为主体清晰的肖像，身后右侧有两个完全相同的模糊动态重影，每个重影呈半透明状并带有水平拖影，仿佛长曝光拍摄的效果。灯光采用电影级体育广告风格：左侧边缘有强烈的青蓝色轮廓光，右侧有温暖的橙金色轮廓光，皮肤和球衣面料带有光泽感，高对比度，浅景深，真实的皮肤纹理，仅主体面部细节清晰。构图为 4:5 竖构图，半身像，主体占据画面大部分空间，头部和重影周围留有黑色负空间，无额外道具，无观众，无体育场，除球衣上真实的 Logo 外无任何额外文字。整体氛围：精英足球转会官宣、动态速度感、自信、奢华运动品牌广告。可根据需要自定义球衣球队为 FC Barcelona，并将广告氛围自定义为 带有动态重影的自信精英足球运动员。
